display.purpose: Landing hero and rare brand moments only.

headline.purpose: Page titles and major student task screens.

title.purpose: Cards, dialogs, section titles, and study controls.

body.purpose: Arabic guidance, legal copy, empty states, and learning prose.

label.purpose: Buttons, navigation, metadata, and compact UI labels.

shadows.name: course-hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Clickable course cards on hover only.

shadows.name: cta-lift
shadows.purpose: Landing page CTAs only, never paired with a decorative border.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and compact control transitions.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Card hover, panel entry, and study tool state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main product action with Sanad Action Blue and a clear focus ring.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #045687; color: #fffdfd; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; min-height: 36px; font-family: Cairo, Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0e293c; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgb(255 160 47 / 0.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Toolbar Button
components.description: Low-emphasis toolbar or navigation action for study controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #fffdfd; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; min-height: 34px; font-family: Cairo, Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.10); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgb(255 160 47 / 0.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Course Card
components.description: Clickable course surface with white content material and restrained hover lift.
components.css: .ds-course-card { overflow: hidden; background: #ffffff; color: #0e293c; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 10px; font-family: Cairo, Geist, sans-serif; transition: box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-course-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.10), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.10); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-course-media { aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0e293c, #045687); } .ds-course-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-course-body h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.35; font-weight: 700; } .ds-course-body p { margin: 0; color: #0e293c; font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.76; }

components.name: Guidance Chip
components.description: Compact rounded cue for study attributes, guidance, or progress labels.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #1b3d54; color: #fffdfd; border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12); border-radius: 14px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: Cairo, Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: White form control with soft border and gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: #0e293c; font-family: Cairo, Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-field input { min-height: 40px; background: #ffffff; color: #0e293c; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; font: inherit; font-weight: 400; } .ds-field input::placeholder { color: rgb(14 41 60 / 0.70); } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgb(255 160 47 / 0.35); border-color: #ffa02f; }

components.name: Sidebar Item
components.description: Compact RTL navigation item for the authenticated product shell.
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; min-height: 36px; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #fffdfd; font-family: Cairo, Geist, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: rgb(255 160 47 / 0.16); color: #fffdfd; } .ds-sidebar-item:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgb(255 160 47 / 0.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Sanad's visual system should feel like a capable tutor sitting beside the student: present, calm, and precise. The interface supports study rather than performing for attention. Its strongest surfaces are dark Sanad Blue foundations, white content material when needed, and a limited Chapter Gold signal for guidance, progress, and primary moments.
keyCharacteristics: Arabic-first RTL structure with Cairo as the defining voice.
Restrained product UI with dark blue foundations and rare gold emphasis.
Course content and study assistance are the visual center, not decoration.
Familiar shadcn/ui interaction vocabulary with careful RTL behavior.
Student comfort wins over information density unless the surface is explicitly administrative.

rules.name: The Gold Means Guidance Rule
rules.body: Chapter Gold is not decoration. If a gold element does not signal action, progress, focus, or instructional guidance, remove it.

rules.name: The No Decorative Display Rule
rules.body: Product UI labels, buttons, tabs, and study controls always use the normal Cairo product scale. Display sizing belongs to the landing page and a few brand moments, not daily workflow.

rules.name: The Dense Only When Needed Rule
rules.body: Compact spacing and heavier data density are permitted for admin or operational tasks. Student-facing study and library screens stay comfortable first.

dos: Do keep Arabic RTL behavior correct across layout, overlays, form controls, and navigation.
Do use Sanad Blue for product structure and Chapter Gold only for guidance, action, progress, or focus.
Do favor comfortable student reading space over dense dashboards on student-facing surfaces.
Do use familiar shadcn/ui affordances for buttons, dialogs, sidebars, tabs, and menus.
Do make the next action obvious in library, enrollment, and study flows.
donts: Don't make Sanad look like a childish tutor app. Avoid cartoonish cues, toy-like controls, excessive gamification, and mascot-led UI.
Don't make student screens feel like dense admin dashboards. Avoid cramped tables, heavy metadata blocks, and cold operational layouts.
Don't use decorative gradients as the default button or heading treatment in product UI.
Don't use Chapter Gold as ambient decoration. Its rarity is the point.
Don't hide standard affordances behind custom controls, clipped dropdowns, or non-obvious gestures.
